content:
✔ “The Mentor’s Boon” – If a student helps another succeed in a challenge, they gain XP but must take a debuff in the next round.
✔ “The Selfless Guide” – A student can “gift” their success, giving up a reward to help another player avoid failure.
✔ “The Pact of Knowledge” – Two students can team up for a major challenge, but if one fails, both suffer the penalty.

✅ Why This Works:
• Encourages a community-based playstyle.
• Makes mentorship a real choice with consequences.
• Ties into major literary themes of sacrifice and heroism.

📌 Final Questions for Version 5.9

1. Should there be a “Secret Alignment System” that tracks how students engage (Hero, Trickster, Scholar, etc.)?

✔ If so, should this affect their final challenge?

2. What should happen if two students independently discover the “True Ending” path?
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 240 (chunk 240/555)
